name: ThreatIntelliganceAgent Architecture Baseline
description: Incrementally maintained ArchiMate knowledge graph for the ThreatIntelliganceAgent workspace. This baseline treats AI4X / multi-agent expansion as the primary design target, models AI4X as an external dependency, expresses unknown threat hunting as a scenario-specific extension over the canonical workspace, and retains the listener plus Neo4j writeback flow only as supporting acceptance context.

attributes.name: model_classification
attributes.description: Whether the architecture work started from an existing reusable model or from scratch.

attributes.name: confirmed_design_decisions
attributes.content:
1. Primary target: AI4X / multi-agent extension.
2. AI4X stays outside the system boundary as an external application service.
3. Unknown threat hunting is a scenario-specific extension over canonical workspace contracts.
4. Listener plus Neo4j writeback remains a supporting acceptance path, not the main architecture storyline.
5. Main view organization uses one intent-trace view plus one scenario view.

attributes.name: evidence_sources
attributes.content: README.md; agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/opencode.json; agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/workspace.contract.json; agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/agents/ThreatIntelPrimary.md; agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/agents/ThreatIntelUnknownHuntPrimary.md; agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/skills/unknown-threat-hunting-ai4x/SKILL.md; agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/tools/ai4x_query.js; agent_app/docker-compose.yml; agent_app/Dockerfile; services/ai4x_client.py; services/python_listener/listener.py; services/python_listener/remote_client.py; services/result_assembler/assembler.py; services/neo4j_validation.py; scripts/run_minimal_closed_loop.py; tests/test_ai4x_platform_integration.py; tests/test_opencode_workspace_config.py; tests/test_unknown_threat_hunting_ai_agent.py; tests/test_minimal_closed_loop_script.py; tests/test_python_listener.py

elements.name: AI4X / 多 Agent 威胁情报扩展目标
elements.description: 在不破坏 canonical workspace 契约的前提下，把 ThreatIntelliganceAgent 演进为可通过外部 AI4X / OpenCTI 数据源扩展分析能力的威胁情报工作区。

attributes.name: verification_focus
attributes.value: Goal is verified indirectly through workspace, agent-definition, and tool-runtime tests rather than through a dedicated goal-level automated test.

attributes.name: design_risks
attributes.value: Primary risk is accidental erosion of canonical role boundaries when new scenario-specific prompts or tools are added.

summary.notes: Baseline refreshed against repository evidence on 2026-04-29.

tasks.name: Refactor stale placeholder architecture into evidence-backed intent trace
tasks.description: Reoriented the model away from generic frontend/backend placeholders toward the actual AI4X / multi-agent workspace boundary.

elements.name: 保持 canonical 契约稳定并通过场景增量扩展
elements.description: 新增能力必须通过 scenario-specific agent/skill/tool contract 叠加，而不是直接篡改 canonical primary, analyst, secops 的稳定职责边界。

elements.name: AI4X 驱动情报扩展能力
elements.description: 系统通过 OPENCODE workspace、受控 agent 角色和受限工具运行时消费外部 AI4X / OpenCTI 数据源，形成可复用的威胁情报扩展能力。

attributes.name: verification_focus
attributes.value: Capability is considered healthy only when canonical coordination, tool-runtime access, and scenario extension all remain mutually consistent.

elements.name: Canonical 多 Agent 协调服务
elements.description: Canonical primary agent owns deterministic remote execution, while analyst and secops remain compatibility roles for approved collaboration and handoff paths.

attributes.name: verification_focus
attributes.value: Verify that real OPENCODE sessions and mock-remote listener integrations still respect the intended agent role boundaries and produce structured outputs.

testcases.name: AI4X-Platform数据消费-模拟OPENCODE-真实AI4X
testcases.description: 验证 canonical 协调路径在 listener 接入 mock remote server 时，仍能让 `ThreatIntelAnalyst_test` 通过真实 AI4X service 完成 catalog、schema、query 驱动的数据消费。
testcases.Input: Listener 触发一次使用 ThreatIntelAnalyst_test 的远端分析请求，mock remote server 必须调用真实 AI4X Platform。

testcases.name: AI4X-Platform数据消费-真实OPENCODE-真实AI4X
testcases.description: 验证 canonical 协调路径在真实 OPENCODE server 中，能以真实 session 消息轨迹完成对 ai4x_query 的 catalog、schema、query 三段调用。
testcases.Input: pytest 直接向真实 OPENCODE session 投递 AI4X 数据消费指令。

elements.name: 未知威胁猎杀服务
elements.description: Scenario-specific service for graph-based unknown threat hunting that preserves canonical contracts while adding a dedicated primary prompt and skill over external AI4X / OpenCTI data.

attributes.name: verification_focus
attributes.value: Verify that the scenario remains additive, keeps the full flow inside the primary agent, and still uses ai4x_query in catalog -> schema -> query order.

testcases.name: 基于关联图谱的未知威胁猎杀-AI_AGENT需求
testcases.description: 验证未知威胁猎杀是建立在 canonical workspace 之上的场景化增量能力，而不是通过修改 canonical agent/skill 契约直接替代主线。
testcases.Input: 读取 `.opencode` 工作区内 canonical agent、scenario agent、scenario skill 与 ai4x_query 工具定义。

elements.name: 闭环事件接入与验收服务
elements.description: Supporting service used to prove that event intake, remote analysis, result assembly, and Neo4j validation can still execute end to end. It is retained as acceptance context rather than as the primary design storyline.

attributes.name: verification_focus
attributes.value: This service verifies the repository's operational acceptance path, not the primary AI4X extension architecture branch.

testcases.name: [闭环验收/集成验收]标准高危威胁事件闭环分析
testcases.description: 验证 supporting closed-loop acceptance path 可从 mock OPENCTI 事件出发，经 listener、remote analysis、result assembly 与 Neo4j validation 生成结构化结果并写回验证投影。

elements.name: Threat Intelligence OPENCODE Workspace
elements.description: Local workspace control plane that fixes default_agent, canonical role aliases, tool roots, and scenario-specific extension files without moving the system boundary into AI4X itself.

attributes.name: verification_focus
attributes.value: Workspace must retain canonical role mappings and ship all local runtime assets required by the OPENCODE tool runtime.

testcases.name: Workspace declares canonical roles and aliases
testcases.description: 验证 workspace control plane 明确声明 canonical primary、analyst、secops 角色和兼容别名映射。

testcases.name: Workspace ships local tool runtime dependencies
testcases.description: 验证 workspace 本地包含 OPENCODE tool runtime 所需的 Python CLI、STIX 样例与工具包，而不是依赖仓库外部副本。

elements.name: Canonical Agent Definitions
elements.description: Prompt contracts for canonical primary, analyst, secops, plus approved scenario-specific extensions that must remain compatible with the canonical role map.

attributes.name: acceptance_outcomes
attributes.value: Agent contracts are acceptable only if real OPENCODE sessions, mock remote sessions, and scenario overlays all preserve canonical boundaries.

elements.name: Threat Intel Orchestrator Runtime
elements.description: Runtime orchestration component that assembles deterministic remote execution and produces schema-aligned structured outputs through the OPENCODE tool contract.

attributes.name: verification_gap
attributes.value: No dedicated standalone test targets this component by itself; it is covered indirectly through the canonical coordination and closed-loop acceptance tests.

elements.name: Evidence Query Tool Runtime
elements.description: Controlled tool runtime that exposes AI4X query, STIX query, and schema-explorer capabilities while enforcing agent-scope restrictions and local runtime packaging rules.

attributes.name: verification_focus
attributes.value: Tool runtime must prove both functional AI4X access and scope restriction behavior for canonical and scenario-specific agents.

testcases.name: 查询AI4X-Platform上的数据
testcases.description: 验证 evidence tool runtime 能经由 `ai4x_query` 与本地 Python CLI 访问真实 AI4X universal query 接口，并返回结构化查询结果。
testcases.Input: 执行 `.opencode/tools/ai4x_query.js` 的 `query` 命令并指向真实 AI4X Platform。

testcases.name: 发现AI4X-Platform上可以提供的数据范围
testcases.description: 验证 evidence tool runtime 能经由 `ai4x_query` 发现真实 AI4X schema catalog，并将 catalog 数据稳定地反馈给 agent 层。
testcases.Input: 执行 `.opencode/tools/ai4x_query.js` 的 `catalog` 命令并指向真实 AI4X Platform。

elements.name: Workspace Contract and Semantic Schema Assets
elements.description: Control-plane JSON and semantic schema assets that constrain what the workspace can load, what analysts may inspect, and how query planning stays grounded in declared source structures.

testcases.name: Schema explorer publishes semantic schema menu for analyst agents
testcases.description: 验证语义 schema 资产可通过 analyst-only 的 `db_schema_explorer` 暴露出足够的实体、属性和关系菜单供查询规划使用。

testcases.name: Schema explorer rejects direct non-analyst access
testcases.description: 验证语义 schema 资产的直接探索权限不会暴露给非 analyst 角色。

elements.name: Python Listener Integration
elements.description: Supporting ingress component that normalizes events, persists remote request context, dispatches remote analysis, and optionally triggers real Neo4j validation writeback.

attributes.name: verification_gap
attributes.value: Listener is exercised through the closed-loop acceptance path and dedicated listener tests, but it is intentionally secondary in the main architecture narrative.

elements.name: Structured Result Assembly
elements.description: Supporting assembly component that validates remote outputs against the schema-derived result contract before acceptance summaries and Neo4j writeback are considered complete.

elements.name: Remote OPENCODE Runtime
elements.description: Containerized runtime that exposes the remote OPENCODE server on host port 8124 and mounts `agent_app/opencode_app` as the working project inside the container.

attributes.name: runtime_contract
attributes.value: docker compose service `opencode` maps host 8124 to container 4096 and sets THREAT_INTEL_AI4X_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:8000.

elements.name: AI4X Platform API Center
elements.description: External application service that exposes schema catalog, per-source schema discovery, and universal query APIs consumed by this repository's evidence-query runtime.

attributes.name: boundary_decision
attributes.value: External dependency. The repository consumes it but does not own its internal architecture.

attributes.name: verification_focus
attributes.value: Only direct catalog/schema/query contracts are modeled here because those are the repository-proven integration points.

elements.name: Neo4j Validation Runtime
elements.description: Supporting Neo4j runtime used only for validation projection and closed-loop acceptance writeback checks.

elements.name: Legacy STIX SCHEMA placeholder
elements.description: Deprecated generic placeholder retained only for maintenance traceability. Its responsibilities were split into `Workspace Contract and Semantic Schema Assets` and the supporting local STIX sample assets.

elements.name: Legacy TOOL placeholder
elements.description: Deprecated generic placeholder retained only for maintenance traceability. Its responsibilities were replaced by `Evidence Query Tool Runtime`.

elements.name: Business Layer Baseline
elements.description: View anchor for business-layer architecture slices.

elements.name: Application Layer Baseline
elements.description: View anchor for application-layer architecture slices.

elements.name: Technology Layer Baseline
elements.description: View anchor for technology-layer architecture slices.

elements.name: Maintenance Decisions
elements.description: Repository-scoped maintenance log for what was retained, renamed, or deprecated during this architecture refresh.

summary.notes: Legacy placeholders were either renamed into evidence-backed elements or explicitly deprecated.

tasks.name: Retain stable IDs for AI4X and closed-loop elements
tasks.description: Preserved stable IDs for goal, capability, workspace, tools, AI4X service, OPENCODE runtime, unknown-hunt test anchor, and closed-loop acceptance anchor.

tasks.name: Deprecate stale generic placeholders
tasks.description: Legacy generic TOOL and STIX SCHEMA placeholders were left in the model as deprecated elements instead of silently deleted.

views.parent_element_name: AI4X / 多 Agent 威胁情报扩展目标
views.description: Shows the strategic target, the governing principle, and the capability statement that anchors the rest of the model.
Shows which services realize the AI4X extension capability and which supporting acceptance path remains secondary.
Shows the concrete application components that carry the workspace control plane, agent contracts, orchestration, tool runtime, schema assets, and secondary listener path.
Shows the runtime nodes and external service contracts that the repository depends on at deployment time.
Shows the scenario-specific business service and the exact workspace structures that make it additive rather than canonical-contract breaking.
Captures retained, renamed, and deprecated modeling decisions for governance continuity.
Primary architecture view that traces the chosen strategy into business services, application components, and runtime dependencies.
